ENABLE_CURSE_CHARACTER.title: CURSE_EVERYTHING_ENABLE_CURSE_CHARACTER
ENABLE_CURSE_CHARACTER.tooltip: Curses your character at run start.

ENABLE_CURSE_STARTING_GEAR.title: CURSE_EVERYTHING_ENABLE_CURSE_STARTING_GEAR
ENABLE_CURSE_STARTING_GEAR.tooltip: Curses all starting weapons and the items granted by your character before wave 1.

ENABLE_CURSE_CRATE_ITEMS.title: CURSE_EVERYTHING_ENABLE_CURSE_CRATE_ITEMS
ENABLE_CURSE_CRATE_ITEMS.tooltip: Curses every item you pick up from item crates, including any bonus crate items.

ENABLE_CURSE_SHOP_ITEMS.title: CURSE_EVERYTHING_ENABLE_CURSE_SHOP_ITEMS
ENABLE_CURSE_SHOP_ITEMS.tooltip: Curses all items in the shop each wave.

ENABLE_CURSE_ENEMIES.title: CURSE_EVERYTHING_ENABLE_CURSE_ENEMIES
ENABLE_CURSE_ENEMIES.tooltip: Guarantees all enemies (except Bosses) spawn cursed, regardless of your Curse stat. Without this, only enemies affected by your Curse stat are cursed.

ENABLE_CURSE_ANY_ENEMY.title: CURSE_EVERYTHING_ENABLE_CURSE_ANY_ENEMY
ENABLE_CURSE_ANY_ENEMY.tooltip: Allows Looters (the item-dropping aliens) to be cursed. When off, Looters are excluded from enemy cursing even if your Curse stat or the enemy cursing option would normally affect them.

DISABLE_CURSE_RANDOM.title: CURSE_EVERYTHING_DISABLE_CURSE_RANDOM
DISABLE_CURSE_RANDOM.tooltip: Makes all curses apply with the same fixed strength instead of varying randomly.

MIN_CURSE_MODIFIER.title: CURSE_EVERYTHING_MIN_CURSE_MODIFIER
MIN_CURSE_MODIFIER.tooltip: Sets a floor on how weak a curse can be. Higher values mean weaker curses get bumped up to at least this strength. Leave at 0 for normal cursing behaviour.
